ariaSpec.usage: Sets the proper role for the OTP.
The hidden input holding the OTP inputs value.
Hides the hidden input from assistive technologies.

ariaSpec.attribute: label for or aria-label or aria-labelledby
ariaSpec.usage: The input needs an accessible name to be assigned to it.
Sets the default autocomplete for the input.
Points to the hint or error message for the OTP inputs.
Rendered only when the OTP is in a form and announces the invalid state.
Rendered only when the OTP is disabled.

kbSpec.behavior: Sets the value in the input and moves the focus to the next focusable input in the OTP. (if any)
Focuses the next input in the OTP. If the focus is on the last input, focuses the next focusable element on the page.
Focuses the previous input in the OTP. If the focus is on the first input, focuses the previous focusable element before the OTP.
Moves the focus to the next focusable input in the OTP. (if any)
Moves the focus to the previous focusable input in the OTP. (if any)
Deletes the value of the focused input and moves the focus on the previous input. (if any).
Deletes the value of the focused input.
